title: Head Items
description:
A datapack that allows players to throw any item on their head even if it is not a helmet.
(Makes Items Wearable)
body:
# Head Items
Letting players throw items on their head since 2024!

![Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38a567bb81498f07a3845873519f2370778bb3df_0.webp)

# Description 
A datapack that allows players to throw any item on their head even if it is not a helmet. It will not replace the current item on your head if you are already wearing one. Keep in mind that this datapack has not been heavily tested so there may be bugs (Hopefully not!).
